productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Solid Navy Blue Shorts
description: Composition Navy blue shorts made of 100% polyester, engineered with ClimaLite technology, has adidas patented 3-Stripes along the length, elasticated waist with a drawcord, mesh lining on the inside with doggles at the hem, two insert pockets on the sides and brand name appliqued below the left pocketFitting Regular  Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on print,trims,logoSweat it out in comfort on the tracks or at the gym in this ClimaLite engineered pair of shorts from adidas. The ClimaLite feature wicks sweat away from the body, keeping you fresh and comfortable all day, while the polyester fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with an Adidas T-shirt and running shoes for the best results.Model statistics  The model wears shorts of length 45 cmHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
